summary: Phase 3 refinement UI testing on Magnaura Foods complete. All 32 test assertions across hero layout, reserve-table smooth scroll, reservation form validation + success + reset, menu filters (All & Chef Special only) with expected PDF items and prices, gallery page (video hero + 2 sections + 6 lazy-loaded photos), download-link audit on both routes, and mobile responsiveness passed.
critical_code_review_comments: App.jsx is ~815 lines. Consider splitting Hero, Reservation, LeadForm, Navbar into separate component files for maintainability.
Reservation form uses api.submitContact as a hack (subject/message workaround). Consider creating a dedicated /api/reservations endpoint for cleaner data model.
GalleryPage restaurantPhotos use external Unsplash URLs — consider self-hosting for reliability and to avoid external dependency.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 refinement fully verified. Hero shows correct 5 slides with titles and left-aligned overlay, video slide 1 uses chef flambe with poster fallback in headless. Reserve-a-Table smooth-scrolls to #reservation (scrollY=8614, resTop~0). Reservation form validates all 6 fields with expected messages, submits to success view with correct dynamic content, and 'Make Another Reservation' resets state. Menu shows exactly 'All' and 'Chef Special' filters and PDF items (PATTY KULCHA 169, CHEF SPECIAL DOSA 229, 4 IN 1 PIZZA 599, TANDOORI PLATTER 599). Gallery has exactly gallery-hero + gallery-section-events + gallery-section-photos, no Fire Shows/Customer Moments, 2 event videos with correct captions, 6 lazy-loaded photos. Zero <a download>, /downloads/, or .mp4 hrefs and no visible 'Download' text on either route.
